name: NoWorriesBankruptcy.com
description_short: San Jose bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, offering free consultations and affordable representation starting at $100 retainer with flexible payment plans.
description_long:
NoWorriesBankruptcy.com is a bankruptcy law practice operated by Dean W. Feldman, Esq., serving the San Jose area and surrounding regions. The firm focuses exclusively on consumer bankruptcy representation, helping individuals navigate debt relief through federal bankruptcy filings. The practice emphasizes accessibility and affordability as core business principles, positioning itself as an alternative to higher-cost bankruptcy attorneys in the region.

The firm offers comprehensive Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing services, including initial free consultations, case filing and completion, representation at mandatory trustee meetings, and guidance through the entire bankruptcy process. They advertise a low initial retainer of $100 with flexible, interest-free payment plans tailored to client financial situations. The firm also provides online and phone-based appointments to accommodate clients who prefer remote service delivery.

NoWorriesBankruptcy.com distinguishes itself through several specific offerings: military discount pricing for veterans and active-duty service members, explicit focus on stopping wage garnishments and lawsuits, detailed education about Chapter 7 versus Chapter 13 eligibility and processes, and emphasis on convenience through remote appointment options. The website messaging repeatedly highlights affordability, describing their fees as "low" and "discounted" compared to competitors, while promising a thorough explanation of bankruptcy procedures.

The firm operates as a traditional law office providing bankruptcy legal services, not a debt settlement or credit repair company. Limitations include geographic focus on San Jose and surrounding areas, lack of published fee schedules (requiring case-by-case assessment), and standard bankruptcy filing timelines that are court-dependent. The marketing emphasizes urgency regarding filing deadlines and eligibility, which may or may not reflect actual legal requirements for individual situations.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free initial consultation with no obligation or cost
Low starting retainer of $100 to begin case work
Flexible, interest-free payment plans tailored to client budget
Military discount available for veterans and active-duty service members
Online and phone appointment options for remote convenience
Representation at mandatory Federal Bankruptcy Court trustee meetings included
Specific focus on stopping wage garnishments and lawsuits through filing
cons: No published fee schedule; final costs only determined after case review
Geographic limitation to San Jose area and surrounding communities only
Marketing uses urgency language about deadlines that may not apply universally
Website lacks specific information about timeline from filing to discharge
No client testimonials, reviews, or case results posted for verification
best_for: San Jose area residents facing wage garnishment or lawsuits seeking immediate relief
Military veterans and active-duty service members seeking discounted bankruptcy representation
Individuals with limited budgets needing affordable attorney-led Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 filing
People preferring remote consultations and online service delivery options
diagnosis: NoWorriesBankruptcy.com is best suited for San Jose-area residents facing active debt collection, wage garnishment, or lawsuits who need affordable attorney representation for Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing. The primary caveat is that actual fees and timelines are not disclosed upfront—the $100 retainer is only the initial amount, and total costs must be determined during consultation based on case complexity.
services: Wage garnishment and lawsuit prevention through bankruptcy filing
Representation at Federal Bankruptcy Court trustee meetings
Flexible payment plan arrangements with no interest charges
Military discount pricing for veterans and active-duty service members
Debt eligibility assessment and case planning
Guidance on Chapter 7 versus Chapter 13 selection
Debt relief and fresh start planning
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: B, 1211 Park Ave UNIT 216, San Jose, CA 95126
